message:
feat(ui): overhaul flywheel visualization with hover HUD, expanded dashboard, and refined layout

Major redesign of the FrankenFlywheel interactive visualization that
transforms the detail panel from a simple list view into a full
forensic dashboard, adds desktop hover intelligence, and widens the
overall layout for better information density.

New component — NodeHoverHUD:
  Adds a spatially-aware hover tooltip for desktop flywheel nodes.
  When a user hovers over a tool node (without clicking), a glass-
  morphism HUD appears on the opposite side of the reactor (flips
  left/right based on whether the node is past the center X
  coordinate). The HUD displays the tool's name, tagline, GitHub
  star count, and link density percentage. Hidden on mobile (lg:block)
  and rendered inside AnimatePresence for smooth enter/exit. Uses the
  new Network and Star lucide-react icons.

New dependency — AnimatedNumber:
  Imports the AnimatedNumber component for smooth count-up transitions
  on the GitHub stars and connectivity percentage displays in both
  the hover HUD and the selected-tool dashboard header.

Layout expansion:
  - Outer FrankenContainer max-width widened from 1400px to 1600px
    to accommodate the richer detail panel.
  - Grid proportions changed from [1.3fr,1fr] to [1fr,1.5fr] at lg
    and [1fr,1.8fr] at xl, giving the dashboard panel significantly
    more horizontal space for the new two-column layout.
  - Reactor stage min-height increased to 700px on md+ screens.
  - Reactor padding reduced from p-24 to p-12 on md to reclaim space.
  - Mobile flywheel scale adjusted from 0.55 to 0.5, with a new
    intermediate md:scale-[0.85] breakpoint for tablets.
  - Multiple elements changed from overflow-hidden to overflow-visible
    to allow the new hover HUD and FrankenBolts to render outside
    their bounding boxes (complementing the FrankenContainer skin-
    layer refactor in the prior commit).

Selected-tool dashboard ("Forensic Dashboard") redesign:
  - Header: Now a full-width section with gradient top border accent,
    tool name scaled up to text-5xl/6xl, UUID badge, and a stats
    block showing GitHub stars (AnimatedNumber) and connectivity
    percentage side by side in a dark inset card.
  - Body: Split into a responsive 2-column grid —
    Left column ("Functionality_Matrix"): Feature bullets with hover
    gradient reveal effect, LayoutGrid section icon.
    Right column ("Synaptic_Pathways"): Connection cards redesigned
    with accent-colored left border bars, LINK_0N identifiers, quoted
    connection descriptions, and animated progress bars that fill on
    mount (staggered by connection index).
  - Footer ("Operation_Finalization"): Descriptive text alongside the
    CTA button (previously just a full-width button). Button has
    bouncing FlaskConical icon and wider padding.
  - Panel animation direction changed from horizontal (x: 20/-20) to
    vertical (y: 20/-20) for a more natural card-swap feel.

Idle state redesign:
  - Centered layout with corner bracket decorations (border-t/l, etc.)
    creating a "targeting reticle" frame effect.
  - DNA icon enlarged to h-16/w-16 with nested Activity pulse icon
    overlaid at center.
  - Status label changed from "Neural_Network_Idle" to
    "Neural_Network_Online" with increased tracking.
  - Stats grid expanded from 2 to 3 columns: Active_Nodes,
    Stability (100%), and Uptime (14d) — all at text-3xl.
  - Description text restyled to bold uppercase with wider tracking.
  - NeuralPulse in idle state receives explicit green color.

Reactor core cleanup:
  - Removed NeuralPulse overlay from the central Zap icon container
    (was visually cluttered at that scale).

Per-tool theming propagation:
  - FrankenBolts on each tool node now receive color={nodeColor} prop
    so bolt accents match the tool's unique color rather than using
    the default amber.

Mobile bottom sheet updates:
  - Tool icon container switched from gradient class to inline accent
    color styling (backgroundColor/borderColor) for consistency.
  - Feature list text made bold.
  - CTA button uses inline panelAccent background instead of gradient
    class; label changed to "REPOSITORY_PROTOCOL".

Signal overlay animation:
  - The "SIGNAL_LOCK" indicator in the top-right corner now pulses
    with a motion.div opacity animation [0.2, 1, 0.2] over 2 seconds,
    and text changed from "ACQUIRED" to "STABLE". Overall container
    opacity increased from 0.2 to 0.3.

Comment cleanup:
  - Removed several redundant section-divider comments that restated
    what the code already communicates through component names and
    structure (e.g. "// --- UTILS ---", "// Spectrum of colors...",
    "// Generate a high-jitter lightning path", JSDoc blocks on
    internal functions). Kept meaningful structural comments.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
